title: JOBS READINESS PROGRAM - 211info
text: YOUTH OUTREACH SERVICES JOBS READINESS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides job readiness and development support for youth and young adults. Provides resume help, job workshops, follow-up assistance, skill building, interview practice, career assessment, and educational support. 719 E 1st Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Ages 14-24 Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-8pm (503) 538-8023 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 538-8023 Isabella Norman [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Yamhill County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-8pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Next to Domino's Pizza downtown Services: Prejob Guidance Youth Employment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - YOUTH OUTREACH DROP-IN CENTER HOUSING/SHELTER - SAFE SHELTER HOUSING/SHELTER - YOUTH TRANSITIONAL LIVING PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
